compat-legacy-cleanup.summary: Archived historical compat_legacy training scripts and logs. 5 core module files retained in families/compat_legacy/ for active pipeline imports.
notes: Phase 1: Removed 630 MB of log files (58 files).
Phase 2: Archived ~70 training scripts, analysis tools, and docs to archive/legacy_families/compat_legacy_archive/.
5 core files retained: data_curriculum.py, models.py, train_v6.py, models_single_vq_ema.py, models_rvq.py.
Phase 3 (import path extraction to deps/) deferred pending material-generalization completion.
